About
Welcome to my website! I'm currently a junior at UW-Madison majoring both Computer Science and Biochemistry, as I'm enamored both by how the logic of computers function, as well how chemical molecules interact within the human body. Consequently, I'm interested in using my skills in Computer Science and Biochemistry to help develop the medical society, as well as pursuing a career that exists within the intersection between healthcare and technology.
환영합니다! 저는 한국어도 가능합니다. ^^
I was born in South Korea, but I've lived the majority of my life in Fremont, California. As a result, I'm bilingual in both Korean and English.
Resume
Projects
CurveAlign and CT-Fire
Working on V6.0 of CurveAlign, mainly on the visualization of data when quantifying the interactions between collagen fibers and tumor cells
